title: Build Genesis Road game development platform
description: Fair revenue splits (70/30 creator favor). Visual game creation, no 1000-hr learning curve. Asset marketplace, physics engine, multiplayer support. Export to all platforms. Scaffold mechanics automatically.
result:
Built Genesis Road - Professional game engine and development platform (Product #78). Live at https://d53d2e5e.blackroad-admin.pages.dev

Features:
- Visual scene editor with drag-and-drop interface
- 2D & 3D game support with WebGL/WebGPU rendering
- Built-in physics (Box2D/Bullet) with collision detection
- Scripting system (JavaScript/TypeScript/Lua + visual scripting)
- Cross-platform export (Web, iOS, Android, Windows, macOS, Linux)
- Asset marketplace (10,000+ free and premium assets)
- Team collaboration with version control
- 6 game templates (endless runner, platformer, racing, puzzle, shooter, RPG)
- Real-time preview with hot reload
- Particle systems and VFX

Pricing: FREE (5 projects, web) → $25/mo Pro (unlimited, all platforms) → $99/mo Studio (white label, source code)

🤖 Built with Claude Code | Product #78 of 200+
